name: Phase1 public project status
important_boundary: Percentages are planning estimates, not production-readiness or security-hardening claims.

projects.name: Phase1 operator console
projects.state: usable edge console with guarded host access, VFS, dashboards, help UI, themes, learning, and tests
projects.next_milestone: polish release-facing flows and keep safe defaults simple

projects.name: Fyr native language
projects.state: seed language and toolchain surface exist with scripts, tests, assertions, package checks, and docs
projects.next_milestone: expand language book, package workflow, and runtime integration

projects.name: Base1 secure host / OS track
projects.state: documentation, dry-run scripts, release archives, validation gates, recovery planning, and x86_64 boot planning exist
projects.next_milestone: advance from dry-run/read-only evidence to VM and hardware validation

projects.name: X200 / Libreboot hardware path
projects.state: USB staging, framebuffer proof paths, recovery notes, and safety gates exist; hardware success remains evidence-bound
projects.next_milestone: capture repeatable physical boot evidence without strengthening claims early

projects.name: Security and crypto policy
projects.state: trust model, crypto policy roadmap, provider registry, profile docs, config schema, and integrity checks are present
projects.next_milestone: move from documentation policy into scoped implementation only after tests and review evidence

projects.name: Website and public docs
projects.state: public site, status page, status JSON, badge endpoint, organized docs, asset policy, and Pages routing are in place
projects.next_milestone: keep the Pages workflow generating public status from repository state

projects.name: Repository organization
projects.state: minimal root has 12 tracked files, 16 top-level folders, 0 unplanned root files, 0 tracked build files, and 0 root status duplicates
projects.next_milestone: keep generated artifacts out of Git and keep compatibility links clean as work lands
